Localization.Description: Files in the home directory of one of the users were changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed file {object.fullpath} in the home directory of the user {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed files in the home directory of the user {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
Files in the home directory of the user {datafield4} were changed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed files in the home directory of the user {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
File {object.fullpath} in the home directory of the user {datafield4} was changed by another user on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed file {object.fullpath} in the home directory of the user {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
